results.title: Johor BN rules out coalition government if it retains power, says Onn Hafiz
results.description: JOHOR BARU: Johor Barisan Nasional will not form a coalition government with any other political party if it retains power after the state election, says its chairman, Datuk Onn Hafiz Ghazi.

results.title: These are the top concerts coming to Toronto in July
results.description: Lionel Richie, Earth, Wind & Fire, Santana, J. Cole, Billy Talent, Tame Impala and Tim McGraw headline July's biggest concerts coming to Toronto.

results.title: Nutrition initiative brings hope to mothers and children in hard-to-reach communities
results.description: A national-level learning dissemination event in Dhaka has highlighted the need for stronger coordination among health, agriculture, water and local government sectors to ensure uninterrupted supplies of essential medicines and nutrition commodities for vulnerable mothers and children. The event, held today (24 June), focused on the achievements and lessons of the Transforming Lives Through Nutrition project, which works to improve access to healthcare and nutrition services in remote and underserved areas of Bangladesh. Organised by the Institute of Public Health Nutrition with support

results.title: Iran says deal to end Mideast war 'declaration of US defeat'
results.description: The war that began with a massive US-Israeli campaign of strikes against Iran on February 28 ended with the Islamic Republic striking an agreement its leaders have sought to portray as a victory.

results.title: A settlement between Milo and FLEDC good news for residents
results.description: PENN YAN — With the start of a trial looming just two weeks from now, two Yates County municipalities and the county’s economic development entity have entered into a stipulation and settlement agreement that would end two lawsuits and an...

results.title: Schools in Tokyo suburb to get bear sprays
results.description: A Tokyo suburb has announced an emergency spending plan to buy 700 anti-bear sprays for schools and community organisationsThe local government told AFP on Wednesday (June 24), as the animals increasingly encroach into built-up areas around Japan

results.title: Caplight Raises $16M Series A led by BlackRock and Fin Capital to power the next era of private markets
results.description: SAN FRANCISCO, June 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Caplight Technologies has closed a $16 million Series A led by BlackRock and Fin Capital, with strategic participation from UBS Investment Bank. The round extends its lead in venture secondary data and fuels expansion across private market data and agentic workflows for research and transactions. Caplight’s data shows [...]

results.title: Jim Dey | Foes of assisted-suicide law seek to give it an early burial
results.description: In December, Gov. J.B. Pritzker signed a groundbreaking law that authorized physician-assisted suicide for individuals who are terminally ill.

results.title: 'Moving wasn't just about the incentive': U.K. doctor feels at home practising in Welland
results.description: Dr. Akinpelu Babatunde, 41, moved to the Rose City in February 2025. Since then he has set up Crowland Medical Centre, which already has more than 600 patients and plans to recruit a third physician.

results.title: From the editor: New Quad-City Times series connects readers with librarians’ favorite books
results.description: Looking for your next great read? Local librarians will share their favorite books each month in a new Quad-City Times series.
